title: Date-Time Properties
text: Date-Time Properties Define the date and time properties for the selected language. Note: Alternatively, you can control the formatting of date and time using $NLS_FORMAT and $NLS_LOCALE . For more information, see Language and Locale . Fields Month - Abbreviation Day - Abbreviation Default Date Format Default Time Format Default DateTime Format Alternative for Months How to Define Date and Time Properties for Languages Related Links Language Setups A language setup is a collection of definitions that specify the texts and formatting of language-related data that may be visible in the user interface of a desktop application.
